title: USS Nimitz Carrier Group Encounters 'Tic Tac' Object Off San Diego
detail: During training exercises off the coast of San Diego, F/A-18F Super Hornet pilots from VFA-41 (USS Nimitz) are vectored to investigate radar anomalies tracked by USS Princeton's SPY-1 radar for two weeks. Commander David Fravor and Lt. Commander Alex Dietrich observe a white, oblong ('Tic Tac') object approximately 40 feet long hovering over a disturbance in the ocean. Object exhibits no wings, no visible propulsion, no exhaust. When Fravor descends to intercept, the object rapidly accelerates and disappears. A second jet records infrared video (FLIR1). Pentagon officially confirms the video's authenticity in 2017 and releases it in 2020.

media.caption: The Navy Pilot Who Saw a UFO
